users.title: User
users.description: Artisan user profile on the PIE platform

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier for the user

displayName.description: Full name or selected display name

role.description: User profile cohort targeting inclusive UX

location.description: City or rural commune of the user, e.g. Tafraout, Chefchaouen

earnings.description: Total sales or financial income generated through the marketplace

level.description: Gamification master class level, e.g., 'Apprentie Maâlma'

/users/{userId}.description: Document holding each artisan's master profile and progress
